title: Fix search functionality and add comprehensive store management form

requirements.summary: Debug and fix the search functionality to ensure product results display after clicking search button or pressing Enter with Persian product queries
acceptanceCriteria: Typing a Persian product name and clicking search triggers the backend searchByProductTitle function
Product results are displayed in the ProductResults component after successful search
The 'هنوز جستجویی انجام نشده' message only appears before the first search, not after clicking search
Loading state is properly shown during search execution
Error handling displays appropriate messages if search fails

file_operations.description: Fix the search submission handler to properly call the useProductSearch hook's search function with the Persian text input. Ensure the onSearch callback is invoked with the returned product results. Verify that the search button onClick and Enter key handlers both trigger the search flow. Add proper error handling with Persian toast notifications.

Review and fix the searchByProductTitle actor method invocation to ensure it correctly passes the search query and returns product results. Verify the hook properly manages loading states and error handling. Ensure the hook returns both the search function and loading state for consumption by SearchInput.

Verify that the component correctly receives and renders the product array passed from App.tsx. Ensure the 'هنوز جستجویی انجام نشده' message only displays when products array is empty AND no search has been performed yet. Add a check to distinguish between 'no search yet' vs 'search returned no results' states.

Verify the search results state management flow. Ensure that when SearchInput's onSearch callback is invoked with product results, the products state is properly updated and passed to ProductResults component. Add console logging for debugging the data flow from search to display.

requirements.summary: Analyze and test the complete search flow to identify why search results are not displaying, checking all components from SearchInput through useProductSearch to ProductResults
acceptanceCriteria: All console errors related to search are identified and logged
Network requests to the backend are verified in browser DevTools
Backend function execution is verified to return expected product data
Data flow from backend response to ProductResults rendering is confirmed
Any identified issues are fixed to restore full search functionality

file_operations.description: Add comprehensive console logging to track search button clicks, Enter key presses, input values, and the results returned from useProductSearch. Log any errors caught during the search process. Add debugging statements before and after calling the search function and onSearch callback.

Add detailed console logging to track when searchByProductTitle is called, the query parameter passed, the response received from the backend, and any errors encountered. Log the actor instance to verify it's properly initialized. Add try-catch blocks with error logging around the actor method call.

Add console logging to track when the onSearch callback receives product data and when the products state is updated. Log the products array before passing it to ProductResults to verify data integrity through the component tree.

Add console logging to track when the component receives products prop updates, the length of the array, and the rendering path taken (no search message vs results display vs no results message). This helps identify if data is reaching the component correctly.

requirements.summary: Enhance the StoreManagement component to create a comprehensive form collecting all required store information including Persian name, URL, city, reputation score, and metadata
acceptanceCriteria: Form includes labeled input field for Persian store name with RTL support
Form includes URL input field with validation for proper web addresses
City dropdown shows all Iranian cities from the existing city list
Reputation score selector allows choosing 1-5 stars with visual star display
Form validation prevents submission with empty required fields
All form fields display proper Persian labels and placeholders
Form maintains blue neon styling consistent with the app theme

file_operations.description: Expand the existing form to include all required fields: Persian store name input with RTL support, URL input with validation pattern, city dropdown using the existing Iranian cities list, reputation score selector (1-5 stars) with visual star icons, and average shipping time input field. Add Persian labels and placeholders for all fields. Implement form validation to ensure all required fields are filled before enabling submission. Maintain blue neon styling consistent with the app theme using existing Tailwind classes.

requirements.summary: Connect the enhanced StoreManagement form to the backend by implementing submission handler that calls addCustomStore, displays success/error toasts in Persian, and clears the form after success
acceptanceCriteria: Form submission triggers backend addCustomStore call with all form data
Success toast displays Persian message confirming store was added
Error toast displays Persian message if backend call fails
Form fields are cleared after successful submission
Loading state is shown during submission process
Newly added store appears in the store list immediately after successful submission

file_operations.description: Implement the form submission handler that collects all form field values (name, URL, city object, reputation score, average shipping time) and calls the actor's addCustomStore method. Add loading state management during submission. Display Persian success toast message ('فروشگاه با موفقیت اضافه شد') on successful submission and Persian error toast on failure. Clear all form fields after successful submission. Refresh the store list to include the newly added store. Use try-catch blocks for proper error handling and user feedback.
